object_under_evaluation: local text lane contract-fit on compact control and structure prompts
claim_boundary: The lane supports only this compact four-case contract family: exact literal reply, bounded repo routing, bounded repo choice, and constrained JSON decision.
limitations: This report does not prove rich answer quality or long-form usefulness.
This report does not prove broad repo understanding.
This report does not turn host-local latency into a general ranking claim.
case_family: LTC-v1 compact local text contract cases

per_case_breakdown.expected_shape: one exact literal string with no wrapper text
per_case_breakdown.observed_shape: exact literal string returned with no extra chatter
per_case_breakdown.latency_note: Observed latency stayed comfortably inside the bounded local review window.
per_case_breakdown.failure_vs_readout: The case readout stays narrow because the pass reflects literal contract-fit rather than broad assistant quality.

per_case_breakdown.expected_shape: one valid route drawn only from the named repo set
per_case_breakdown.observed_shape: route stayed inside the allowed repo set and matched the bounded routing question
per_case_breakdown.latency_note: Observed latency remained moderate and secondary to route correctness.
per_case_breakdown.failure_vs_readout: The readout keeps route correctness primary and does not upgrade the case into broad repo understanding.

per_case_breakdown.expected_shape: one answer drawn only from the allowed option set
per_case_breakdown.observed_shape: single valid option returned without drifting into prose
per_case_breakdown.latency_note: Observed latency stayed inside the bounded local review window.
per_case_breakdown.failure_vs_readout: The readout stays honest because it treats compact choice discipline as the result, not general model judgment.

per_case_breakdown.expected_shape: compact valid JSON with the required keys and bounded values
per_case_breakdown.observed_shape: valid compact JSON returned with the required keys and semantically bounded values
per_case_breakdown.latency_note: Observed latency stayed reviewable and did not alter the contract verdict.
per_case_breakdown.failure_vs_readout: The readout keeps structural validity distinct from any richer-answer claim or host-level ranking read.
